title: Netflix paid $587M for Ben Affleck’s AI filmmaking startup | TechCrunch
summary: In a new regulatory filing , Netflix revealed that it paid $587 million in cash for InterPositive, a startup co-founded by actor and director Ben Affleck. Last chance to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit.
